name: Daniel Mercuri
background: US Navy Veteran and native-born Californian.
statement: My governorship will NOT be one to lead, but to serve all Californians. I'm a US Navy Veteran and native-born Californian armed with full knowledge and understanding of our Constitution to: investigate, indict, prosecute, and imprison corrupt bureaucrats, protect children from pedophiles and child sex traffickers, restrain school indoctrinators, refine student education, strengthen parental rights, end criminalizing victims and victimizing the criminal, prioritize the lawful citizen over the illegal, penalize government money laundering, end state tax on tips, retirement, property, and income while re-invigorating small businesses and stifling regulatory overreach. We'll become energy independent, restrict CEQA, and provide medical freedom. The status of the people will remain above government at all times under my administration.

positions.economy: End state tax on tips, retirement, property, and income; invigorate small businesses; reduce regulatory overreach; restrict CEQA
positions.education: Parental rights; strengthen student education; limit school indoctrination
positions.immigration: Prioritize lawful citizens over illegal immigrants
positions.publicSafety: Prosecute corrupt bureaucrats; protect children from trafficking
positions.government: Anti-corruption; constitutional governance; people above government
